description_long: This object is a pair of short swords with straight, double-edged black blades that taper to a sharp point. The blades are robust and appear to be made of metal, with a matte finish that reduces glare. Each sword features a simple crossguard with a brass or bronze appearance, providing hand protection. The handles are cylindrical, wrapped in a reddish-brown material, likely wood or leather, and end in a rounded pommel. The overall design is functional and sturdy, with minimal ornamentation, suggesting utility over decoration. These swords could be used as weapons or display pieces in an urban environment, such as a themed restaurant, martial arts studio, or as part of a collection.
description: A pair of straight, double-edged short swords with black blades, brass crossguards, and reddish-brown wrapped handles. The design is functional and minimally decorated.
description_view_0: Front view showing both swords side by side, highlighting the full length of the blades, crossguards, and handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical shape of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the backs of the blades and handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blades and the handle contours.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, reddish-brown, likely wood or leather wrap, rounded pommel
